description: Edge-on industrial X-ray film slab, slight isometric angle: clear 0.007in polyester base with emulsion coated both faces; AgBr grain field glints across both layers; magnifier inset zooms one tabular grain to its darker sensitivity speck; a faint radiation ray streaks through and three grains pulse cyan — the invisible latent-image seeds. Ambient grain shimmer + base sheen loop on the title panel.
